header_bytes: Below is a multiple-choice item. Respond with the letter of the best option.
recipe: DES §R1.1 (frozen candidate-independent single-prefill label-logit template) + §R-REV2.1 (trigger/template resolution)
rendering_rule: template = header + question + one line per option ('<LABEL>. <option text>') in PUBLISHED order + '\n' + answer cue; template ends at the cue (the label position follows it)
tie_break: argmax over label token logprobs, lowest label index on ties, ties logged [REG dependent_vars.item_correct]

tokenizer_derivation_rule.carrier_slots: char_spans concept ids in this corpus are CARRIER SLOTS via f1k-carriers-v1 generator/carrier-index-map (identical copy in this corpus manifest)
tokenizer_derivation_rule.label_token_ids: for each label L in label_alphabet[:k]: the single token id of the label continuation at the answer position (the engine reads next-token logits after the cue); single-token property MUST be verified and recorded at freeze [DES §R1.1]
tokenizer_derivation_rule.spans: per-token concept slot: token t carries carrier slot s iff t's character interval intersects a char_span with slot s; -1 otherwise; d3_template_tokens = tokenizer(d3_template_text), spans NOT applied to d3-text (no-splice arm [DES §2.6])
tokenizer_derivation_rule.status: BLOCKED THIS PASS — requires the GLM-5.2 tokenizer, which is pinned only at bring-up (ASM-1971 discipline); no model/tokenizer download in a $0 pass
tokenizer_derivation_rule.template_tokens: tokenizer(template_text bytes), no BOS-stripping or normalisation beyond the engine's own prefill path

trigger_free_verification: char-level against f1k-trigger-map-v1 (this build, fail-closed); the TOKEN-level re-verification is a freeze-(A) step with the pinned tokenizer
